mapper.sql: CASE A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE WHEN '01' THEN '업무지식' WHEN '02' THEN '기술지식' WHEN '03' THEN '정책지식' ELSE A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE END

A.KNWLDG_ID AS knoId, A.KNWLDG_NM AS knoNm, A.KNWLDG_CN AS knoCn, A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE AS knoTypeCd, AS knoTypeNm, A.OTHBC_AT AS othbcAt, A.EVL_DE AS appYmd, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS userNm, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS regstNm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
AND A.OTHBC_AT = 'Y' AND A.KNWLDG_EVL = '1' AND A.KNWLDG_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%')
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_DAM_KNO_IFM A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DAM_KNO_IFM A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_DAM_KNO_IFM A WHERE A.KNWLDG_ID = #{knoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DAM_KNO_IFM (KNWLDG_ID, KNWLDG_NM, KNWLDG_CN, KNWLDG_TY_CODE, KNWLDG_EVL, OTHBC_AT, EVL_DE, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{knoId}, #{knoNm}, #{knoCn}, #{knoTypeCd}, '1', #{othbcAt}, #{appYmd}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
